command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute 
UPDATE musicVideoJobs 
SET status = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Stopped by owner — scene player audio fix in progress', updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 540001;

UPDATE musicVideoScenes
SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Stopped by owner', updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE jobId = 540001 AND mvSceneStatus IN ('pending', 'generating');
